introSection: Atlantis Adventure is a steel launched roller coaster located at Lotte World in amsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea. It is the only Aqua Trax coaster from Intamin.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Atlantis Adventure made its debut on 26 October 2003. It was one of the first roller coasters with an LSM lift hill.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Atlantis Adventure is a steel launched roller coaster located at Lotte World in amsil-Dong, Songpa-Gu, Seoul, South Korea. It is the only Aqua Trax coaster from Intamin.

Atlantis Adventure made its debut on 26 October 2003. It was one of the first roller coasters with an LSM lift hill.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
